name: flowpilot
description: Local automation command center with safe sandboxed workflows.

scripts.dev: pnpm build:shared && concurrently -n API,WEB -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @flowpilot/api dev" "pnpm --filter @flowpilot/web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/api db:generate && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/api build && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/web build
scripts.test: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/api test && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/web test
scripts.lint: pnpm build:shared && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/api lint && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/web lint && pnpm --filter @flowpilot/shared lint
